subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! It is nighttime, yet at break of dawn the divine bounty and the light of the Most Great Guidance streameth from the unseen realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی شبانگاهست ولی دم صبحگاهی فیض الهی نور هدایت کبری از جهان غیب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the concourse on high
